evidence_summary: Establish the new setting and the physical separation of the protagonists.

The group arrives at the massive city of Thark. Due to their status, they are separated; John Carter is assigned quarters in a large building near the central plaza, while Dejah Thoris remains under Thark supervision.
Awe (at the city) $\rightarrow$ Isolation/Dread (due to separation).

medium shots of the group being processed/separated
